title: Redesign FluidNav + Section eyebrow + Background in App.jsx — ASCII brackets, mono links, CRT bg
acceptance_criteria: FluidNav branding changed to `[ KRISH ]` format with ASCII bracket decoration
Nav links: uppercase, JetBrains Mono, letter-spacing 0.05em, font-size 0.8125rem
Remove rounded-full from nav container — use 0 border-radius
Remove box-shadow transitions on nav (atTop shadow logic removed)
Nav background: solid var(--color-void) with 1px border var(--color-hairline)
Remove background: rgba(3,3,3,0.9) and backdrop-blur-3xl from mobile overlay — use solid bg
Mobile nav links: Geist Extra Bold uppercase, no italic, no tracking-tight override needed
Replace `section-eyebrow` span in Section component with `[ {eyebrow} ]` format in mono uppercase
Remove .section-eyebrow class usage from Section component
Remove bg-mesh div (`<div className="bg-mesh" ... />`) from App — CRT scanline handles bg texture
Keep bg-noise div (opacity now 0.04 from index.css change)
CRT scanline overlay wired in index.css as pseudo-element — verify it renders
Button 'Connect' in nav: use redesigned Button primary with red accent
Footer: no changes needed beyond inheriting global styles
Do NOT modify PROJECTS, WRITEUPS, JOURNEY, STACK, SOCIALS data arrays
Keep LenisProvider import and usage intact
Keep useReveal and useRef hooks unchanged
